Plaintiff'S Motion For Order Pursuant To Ccp Section 2033.280(B); Request For Fees And Sanctions (Set In Dept. 301 In Error, Moving Papers Are For Discovery)
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance - tentative ruling adopted. Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc.'s Plaintiff's Motion For Order Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 2033.280(b) and Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The motion was not filed 16 court days prior to this date, plus 5 days for mailing. The motion was filed November 2, 2005. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
